meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 23: Christopher Caldwell, The Age of Entitlement
meta.description:
Author Christopher Caldwell discusses the relationship between the 1960s and today’s political polarization. 

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/

Show notes: 
Caldwell's Book, "Age of Entitlement:" https://www.amazon.com/Age-Entitlement-America-Since-Sixties/dp/1501106899

Caldwell's appearance on Tucker Carlson Tonight: https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/christopher-caldwell-americas-two-constitutions-competing-visions-of-a-more-perfect-union
